title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・最たる光満ちて今

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By defeating the Eternal Top Three, Mejiro Ardan
successfully overturns a once inevitable destiny.
Her win is so magnificent that even Inari One and
Super Creek celebrate her success.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Impressed, Oguri Cap likens her running to the
prismatic shine of a glass ornament.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Echoing in celebration of Mejiro Ardan's victory,
the crowd's voices extol the "Eternal Top Four,"
now expanded to include the day's winner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan sears her peerlessly bright light into
the fleeting moment, leaving a dazzling trail that
will shine on for all eternity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fully spent after the race, Mejiro Ardan leans on
me for support amidst thunderous applause and
cheers of her name.
